title: Evangelion 30 production history info
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion 3.0 production history info?             Quote Post by GamlinKizaki » Tue Jul 16, 2013 2:33 am I don't know if this has been posted yet or not, but as you all know, Eva 3.0 did a complete 180 on its story compared to what was shown at the end of 2.0. Does any know of the details as to why Anno and his team decided to do this? This would be very interesting to find out.

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Tue Jul 16, 2013 2:39 am It's just an internet rumor. No statements have been made by Khara. Also, if you look closely at 3.0 preview it shows Mark.06 descending to central dogma. (which happened) Then there is the Rei we see in the preview who has alternate school uniform that is seen in 3.0. (in a box outside of her new "house") There are many hints in the preview that show that this happened. I'd say that the time-skip was planned all along.

[]:             Quote Post by GamlinKizaki » Tue Jul 16, 2013 2:44 am That's what I started to think about after I rewatched 3.33. I'm thinking that what was shown in the 2.22 preview might work its way somehow into 4.0, but again, I would just find it so interesting to learn why 3.33 resulted in what it is instead of what was previewed.

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Tue Jul 16, 2013 2:46 am Again, I'm sure we will get most of these questions answered when the CRC for 3.0 comes out. whenever that is

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue Jul 16, 2013 2:57 am Well, if you read the different interviews of the staff, there is evidences for both : Tsurumaki said that the team debated a long time about if Rei II would survive at the end of 2.0(ie if Shinji manages to save her) because they wanted to bring Rei III to explore her character more than the little we saw of her in NGE, especially around the theme one's identity when they are a clone. that tends to hint that the time skip wasn't planned yet. But when you think about it, it's possible that Tsurumaki deliberately played on names to not reveal anything to the readers : after all Rei III is "just" Rei II's soul in a new body, hard to have that theme of the identity of a clone, she would still be Rei Ayanami, but replace Rei III by Rei Q , and it all make sense. Another thing, in a post-release of 3.0 interview, Kaworu's VA revealed that at the very beginning of the "Rebuild" project, Anno told him some very important informations about what would happen to help him better get in his role, and told him to don't talk to it to other members of the team, especially others VA. Seeing Kaworu's very little screen-time in 1.0 and 2.0, these huge informations must be about the time skip, hinting that Anno planned it since the beginning. But anyway, so far it's only an Internet rumor, more information will surely come from the 3.0 CRC interviews, it's impossible that no one will ask them how we have gone from the setting of 2.0 to the hellish world of 3.0 14 years later. How much time it took for the other two CRC to be released after the theatrical release again?

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Tue Jul 16, 2013 3:05 am ElMariachi wrote: How much time it took for the other two CRC to be released after the theatrical release again?

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Tue Jul 16, 2013 3:07 am And for 1.0 CRC the release date was May 2008.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue Jul 16, 2013 3:20 am So it took nine months... so if the same time period is applied here, we should have the 3.0 CRC around August, right? EDIT : I just saw that the 2.0 CRC was released on September 2010, 15 months after the theatrical release... so the 3.0 CRC could also be released around February 2014... if it don't take even more time!

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Tue Jul 16, 2013 3:24 am In all likelihood yes. I just want to get my hands on those interviews.

[]:             Quote Post by Dima » Tue Jul 16, 2013 4:45 am Is it 100% confirmed that we will get a CRC this time? Personally i look forward for the next EVA-EXTRA release because there is a possibility to contain 4.0 info.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue Jul 16, 2013 5:11 am Well, we got a CRC the last two times, and both movies were partial adaptations of NGE(more than partial for 1.0 I admit), here we have a completely new and unseen setting, with everyone screaming for interviews explaining what was the creative process which led to 3.0 and Anno's goal with the time skip. Add to that the fact that this film have an insane information density through all the little details everywhere, it's impossible that Khara and Gainax won't release a CRC, the demand is just too high!

[]:             Quote Post by Dima » Tue Jul 16, 2013 11:57 am Yeah you are probably right,they will release a 3.0 CRC eventually. The thing is that i doubt they will answer the ''hot'' questions. regarding 3.0 preview scenes. I can't understand why a magazine like Newtype can't take an interview with Anno or a producer to answer these questions.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Tue Jul 16, 2013 12:16 pm Q has been extremely wierd with its magazine interactions. Usually with anime it's a huge cross-promotional circlejerk of interview and tidbits but it seems because they initially wanted to keep the whole timeskip secret (and they magically have) they skipped the usual way. Only big article I know of is the super technical one in CG World that really is entirely technical. Then they waited for the BD release to truely start spamming merchandise again I guess to not spoil people too much who decided to pass on the theatrical run. It's been really unconventional and wierd. I guess Japan just isn't as anal as the population of this forum regarding answering questions and they're more than willing to wait for the final movie. given how the big secret timeskip cat is out of the bag now the promotion for Final may be more conventional, feeding us more information in advanced. Also given how Final is FINAL as far as we know they could also drum it up as THE SUPER DUPER CONCLUSION TO THE WEVANGERIWON SHINGEKIJOUBAN FILM SERIES. That said Final walk is for another thread. I'm eagerly awaiting the 3.0 CRC and stealing coins out of wishing wells to pay for it when it does come.

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Tue Jul 16, 2013 12:19 pm Dima wrote: I can't understand why a magazine like Newtype can't take an interview with Anno or a producer to answer these questions.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Tue Jul 16, 2013 12:42 pm Dima wrote: I can't understand why a magazine like Newtype can't take an interview with Anno or a producer to answer these questions.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Tue Jul 16, 2013 12:48 pm I say they should just wait & put out the CRC for 3.0 & Final after the last movie is released. More so than Parts 1 & 2 the last two films in Rebuild are probably designed as being one unit.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Tue Jul 16, 2013 12:51 pm Gendo'sPapa wrote: I say they should just wait & put out the CRC for 3.0 & Final after the last movie is released. More so than Parts 1 & 2 the last two films in Rebuild are probably designed as being one unit.
summary:
[]: Evangelion 3.0 production history info?             Quote Post by GamlinKizaki » Tue Jul 16, 2013 2:33 am I don't know if this has been posted yet or not, but as you all know, Eva 3.0 did a complete 180 on its story compared to what was shown at the end of 2.0. Does any know of the details as to why Anno and his team decided to do this? This would be very interesting to find out.
